channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Astronomers solve Saturn's decades-long spin mystery using Webb telescope
item.description: The James Webb Space Telescope helped scientists solve a decades-old mystery about Saturn's changing rotation rate.

item.title: Study suggests evolution may work differently than previously thought
item.description: A major study challenges a key evolutionary idea, suggesting most permanent genetic changes are not neutral but selected.

item.title: Combining cannabis edibles and alcohol increases driving impairment risk
item.description: Johns Hopkins research finds that mixing cannabis edibles with alcohol leads to greater driving impairment than using either substance alone.

item.title: Triassic crocodile relative had an ostrich-like appearance
item.description: Scientists identify Labrujasuchus expectatus, a Triassic crocodile relative that resembled an ostrich-like dinosaur more than modern crocodiles.
